title: shorea eximia
intro: Shorea eximia, also known as Bintangor or Meranti, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. The medicinal properties of Shorea eximia lie in its heartwood, which contains a high concentration of heartwood extract with potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Shorea eximia include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and provide relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Shorea eximia is commonly prepared in herbal form through infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
